Uses of Package
com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions

  • Packages that use com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions 
    Package Description
    com.github.dakusui.actionunit  
    com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions  
    com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors  
  • Classes in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions used by com.github.dakusui.actionunit 
    Class and Description
    Attempt
    An action that corresponds to Java's try/catch mechanism.
    Attempt.Builder
    A builder to construct an instance of Attempt action.
    Composite
    An interface to represent an action which executes its members.
    Concurrent
    An interface that represents a sequence of actions to be executed concurrently.
    ForEach
    An action that is repeated on values given by an Iterable<T>.
    ForEach.Mode 
    Leaf
    A skeletal base class of a simple action, which cannot be divided into smaller actions.
    Named
    An action that has a name.
    Retry 
    Sequential
    An interface that represents a sequence of actions to be executed one after another.
    Tag
    A tag action.
    TestAction.Builder 
    TimeOut 
    When 
    While 
    With 
  • Classes in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions used by com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions 
    Class and Description
    ActionBase
    A skeletal base class of all Actions.
    Attempt
    An action that corresponds to Java's try/catch mechanism.
    Attempt.Builder
    A builder to construct an instance of Attempt action.
    Composite
    An interface to represent an action which executes its members.
    Composite.Base
    A skeletal implementation for composite actions, such as Sequential.Impl or Concurrent.Base.
    Composite.Factory 
    Concurrent
    An interface that represents a sequence of actions to be executed concurrently.
    Concurrent.Factory 
    Conditioned 
    Conditioned.Base 
    ForEach.Mode 
    Leaf
    A skeletal base class of a simple action, which cannot be divided into smaller actions.
    Named
    An action that has a name.
    Named.Factory
    A factory that creates Named action object.
    Nested 
    Nested.Base 
    Piped
    +--------+ source +---------+ | With |<>----+------->|Source| +--------+ | +---------+ | | | |sinks +---------+ | +------->|Sink[]| A +---------+ | +----------+ pipe +---------+ |Piped|<>--+------->|Pipe| +----------+ | +---------+ | |destinationSinks | +---------+ +------->|Sink[]| +---------+
    Piped.Factory 
    Piped.Impl 
    Sequential
    An interface that represents a sequence of actions to be executed one after another.
    Sequential.Factory
    A factory for Sequential action object.
    TestAction 
    TestAction.Builder
